title: Navigator nightly chain operational — WAI-Spoke/advisors/navigator/ now populated on all active spokes
summary: The hub now runs a 4-step Navigator nightly chain at 02:37 (after minder tender): catalog_refresh → cartographer_aggregate → recommendations_publish → spoke_sync. Every active spoke receives a fresh recommendations-current.json and catalog-cache.json (24h TTL) in WAI-Spoke/advisors/navigator/. Wakeup skills should read this file to surface the recommended model for the session's work type.
what_changed: tools/navigator_nightly.sh wired to cron. First run: 5 providers (fallback), 13 models, fleet-chart 36 sessions, 7 recommendation profiles built, 13 spokes synced.
behavioral_implication: Spokes can now read WAI-Spoke/advisors/navigator/recommendations-current.json at wakeup to get a Navigator-backed model recommendation. File is valid for 24h (check recommendations_valid_through in catalog-cache.json). If file is absent or stale, treat as silent — no error.
action_for_spokes: Update wakeup skill to read recommendations-current.json and surface one line: Navigator: {model_id} for {profile} (score=X). See task-navigator-wakeup-integration-v1 delivered to framework for the spec.
note_on_quality: local_success_fit=0.5 on all profiles until Historian backfills quality scores. Recommendations are catalog-driven for now. Will improve as fleet observations accumulate and Historian scores them.
decision_reason: Advisor lifecycle pattern. Navigator nightly chain operational.
